languages.text: {n}Кассия кривится, словно от кислого фрукта.{/n} "Твои подданные искусно перекрашивают обременяющую их карминовую тайну в золотое сияние веры. Ответ без вопроса. Вопрос — без ответа".

traits.locale_text: {n}Кассия кривится, словно от кислого фрукта.{/n} "Твои подданные искусно перекрашивают обременяющую их карминовую тайну в золотое сияние веры. Ответ без вопроса. Вопрос — без ответа".
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Кассия кривится, словно от кислого фрукта.{/n} "Твои подданные искусно перекрашивают обременяющую их карминовую тайну в золотое сияние веры. Ответ без вопроса. Вопрос — без ответа".
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Cassia verzieht das Gesicht, als hätte sie gerade in eine bittere Frucht gebissen.{/n} "Deine Untertanen färben ihre karminrote Last der Geheimnisse geschickt in einen goldenen Schein des Flehens. Eine Antwort ohne Frage, eine Frage ohne Antwort."
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."

languages.text: {n}Cassia fronce le visage comme si elle venait de croquer un fruit amer.{/n} "Vos sujets teintent habilement leur fardeau carmin de secrets en une lueur dorée de supplication. Une réponse sans question, une question sans réponse."
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."

languages.text: {n}卡西亚皱起了脸，仿佛刚咬到了苦果。{/n}"你的臣民正巧妙地将他们的秘密包袱染成祈求的金色光芒。没有问题的回答，没有回答的问题"。
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."

languages.text: {n}Cassia frunce el ceño como si acabara de morder una fruta amarga.{/n} "Tus súbditos están tiñendo hábilmente su carga carmín de secretos en un brillo dorado de súplica. Una respuesta sin pregunta, una pregunta sin respuesta".
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."

languages.text: {n}カッシアは苦い果実をかじったかのように顔を歪めた。{/n}"あなたの臣下は、秘密というカーマイン色の重荷を、祈りという黄金の輝きに巧みに染め上げている。質問なき答え、答えなき質問"
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."

languages.text: {n}Cassia sanki acı bir meyve ısırmış gibi yüzünü buruşturur.{/n} "Tebaan, sırların karmin rengindeki yükünü ustalıkla altın bir yalvarış parıltısına boyuyor. Sorusuz bir cevap, cevapsız bir soru."
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia scrunches up her face as if she has just bitten into a bitter fruit.{/n} "Your subjects are skillfully dyeing their carmine burden of secrets into a golden glow of supplication. An answer without question, a question without answer."
